title: Add RIOM v1 shared-depth recurrence non-record submission
author: hesong0222-dev

data.description: Replace 9 distinct transformer blocks with 3 shared blocks repeated 3 times, with lightweight learned recurrence gates

parameters.recurrence_gate: per-loop, per-shared-block learned vector mixed through sigmoid

novel_contributions: Introduces shared-depth recurrence to reduce parameter count by sharing 3 transformer blocks repeated 3 times instead of 9 distinct blocks
Uses lightweight learned recurrence gates after each shared block application
Maintains tokenizer, dataset, optimizer family, and export path unchanged from baseline
Demonstrates improved val_bpb and sharply reduced artifact size on local Apple Silicon MLX development run
Isolates changes to record-local training script without affecting training flow, quantized export, or tokenizer-aware bpb accounting
